profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT PP (Persero) Tbk operates as a construction and investment company in Indonesia. It operates through Construction; Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC, Property and Realty); Precast; Equipment Rent; Energy; Revenue from Concession Asset; Toll Road Revenue; and Mining segments. The company engages in drainage and irrigation networks; weirs, dams, and tunnels; bridges and ground drilling locations; MRTs; jetties/ports; wave and ground barriers; reclamation and dredging; rice field printing and clearing; landscaping; drilling; airports; piping; maintenance of production facilities; ground transportation stations; and electrical, mechanical, heating, geothermal, oil and gas, and telecommunications installation. It is also involved in the construction of telecommunications, health, education, residential, office, lodging, processing, and industrial buildings; installation of glass, aluminum, foundations, piles, and prefabricated buildings; floor, wall, and sanitary and ceiling equipment work; painting; mounting scaffolding; exterior and interior decoration; electric power transmission; cooling installation and air ventilation; electricity generation; and information technology activities. In addition, the company engages in ready-to-build areas; housing procurement and management; development, construction, and sale of facilities; hospitality, campgrounds, caravans, tourist lodges, and other short-term accommodation; planning and supervision of construction work; management consulting, construction project management, industrial engineering, and planning; rental of construction equipment; building management; and system development activities. Further, it is involved in the construction and development of toll roads; oil and gas exploration and production contracting; storage of oil and gas goods; and drinking water treatment activities. PT PP (Persero) Tbk was incorporated in 1953 and is headquartered in Jakarta Timur, Indonesia.
